tender.description: Tender for providing I phase LT Line extension to left out houses in Village Bag on Dheera Kahanphat road from existing 11/0.4 kV, 250 kVA Sub-Station Dheera-II in E Section Dheera under Electrical Sub Division, HPSEBL Daroh.
